metadata.split_role: Expanded red/yellow, blue-staining, red-pored, and caution-lane bolete records.
metadata.notes: Physical data split only. Species record bodies were preserved; each canonical slug appears in exactly one base mushroom file. v4.2.84 updated 25 red/caution bolete records with conservative notes, sources, and explicit remaining review reasons. v4.2.86: optional photo patches are treated as fill-only for existing base-record image fields; direct image fallback hardened for Black Velvet Bolete and Suillus tomentosus where applicable. v4.2.87-r2026-04-30-mushroom-suillus-leccinum-credibility4: carried forward with patch-precedence-safe image handling. v4.2.88: 25-record mushroom credibility/review pass; porcini/Tylopilus/Xerocomus records rechecked and remaining red/caution records improved while preserving true image/local-taxonomy review flags. v4.2.96: large red-caution source split into 3 chunks of 13 records; record bodies preserved and original order retained.

review_reason_audit.rule: Normalize explicit review signals into review_reasons/review_note and prefix notes for Needs Review list visibility.

metadata.split_note: v4.2.96 split the red-caution bolete source into three real source files. The original filename is now part 1; parts 2 and 3 continue the same record order.
